title: phaeomeria sanguinea
intro: Phaeomeria sanguinea, also known as the San Gabriel lily or Red Lily, is a perennial plant species native to California. It is a flowering plant that is part of the Gentianaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Phaeomeria sanguinea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
